narrative:
Whitewater C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,331 registered voters, with 77.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.6%, a clear Republican lean of 11.4 percentage points.
